prompt_text:
Analyze the following java classes for violations of the Open/Closed Principle (OCP).

For each class you are given:
- Its full source body
- Its base class bodies (where available in the repo)
- The file's imports
- Short headers of sibling classes in the same file

Use the inheritance and import context to reason about dependencies and substitutability.

## Principle Definition
Software entities should be open for extension but closed for modification. When adding new behavior requires modifyi...
raw_response:
{
  "findings": [
    {
      "file_path": "src/main/java/tools/jackson/core/json/UTF8StreamJsonParser.java",
      "entity_name": "UTF8StreamJsonParser.nextToken",
      "entity_type": "class",
      "line_start": 448,
      "line_end": 537,
      "principle": "OCP",
      "severity": "high",
      "description": "Switch statement on token IDs requires modification to add new token types",
      "reasoning": "The nextToken method uses a switch statement based on character/token types to determine the next parsing action. Adding a new JSON token type or a new structural element would require modifying this switch block, violating the Open/Closed Principle."
    },
    {
      "file_path": "src/main/java/tools/jackson/core/json/UTF8StreamJsonParser.java",
      "entity_name": "UTF8StreamJsonParser._getText2",
      "entity_type": "class",
      "line_start": 315,
      "line_end": 331,
      "principle": "OCP",
      "severity": "medium",
      "description": "Switch statement on token IDs requires modification for new token types",
      "reasoning": "The _getText2 method uses a switch statement to handle different token types. Adding new token types requires modifying this method, which is a classic violation of OCP."
    },
    {
      "file_path": "src/main/java/tools/jackson/core/json/UTF8JsonGenerator.java",
      "entity_name": "UTF8JsonGenerator.copyCurrentEvent",
      "entity_type": "class",
      "line_start": 1085,
      "line_end": 1125,
      "principle": "OCP",
      "severity": "high",
      "description": "Switch statement on token IDs requires modification to add new token types",
      "reasoning": "The copyCurrentEvent method uses a switch statement to handle different token types. Adding new token types requires modifying this method, violating OCP."
    },
    {
      "file_path": "src/main/java/tools/jackson/core/json/WriterBasedJsonGenerator.java",
      "entity_name": "WriterBasedJsonGenerator._prependOrWriteCharacterEscape",
      "entity_type": "class",
      "line_start": 1056,
      "line_end": 1139,
      "principle": "OCP",
      "severity": "medium",
      "description": "Hardcoded escape logic prevents extension of character escaping strategies",
      "reasoning": "The method uses hardcoded logic for different escape codes (\\N, \\uXXXX, custom). Adding new escape strategies or modifying existing ones requires modifying this method directly."
    }
  ]
}

findings.description: Switch statement on token IDs requires modification to add new token types
findings.reasoning: The nextToken method uses a switch statement based on character/token types to determine the next parsing action. Adding a new JSON token type or a new structural element would require modifying this switch block, violating the Open/Closed Principle.

findings.description: Switch statement on token IDs requires modification for new token types
findings.reasoning: The _getText2 method uses a switch statement to handle different token types. Adding new token types requires modifying this method, which is a classic violation of OCP.

findings.reasoning: The copyCurrentEvent method uses a switch statement to handle different token types. Adding new token types requires modifying this method, violating OCP.

findings.description: Hardcoded escape logic prevents extension of character escaping strategies
findings.reasoning: The method uses hardcoded logic for different escape codes (\N, \uXXXX, custom). Adding new escape strategies or modifying existing ones requires modifying this method directly.
